creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please try the latest version of the port (1.0_7) and let us know if the 
problem is still here. Please also make sure that you have latest versions 
of all GNOME/GTK/GLIB components, because recently some of them were fixed 
to work properly on FreeBSD. Thanks!
